Found the root cause: line 374 of the parser — `dedup.filter((ex) => ex.solution !== null)` removes all exercises without solutions when any exercise HAS a solution. This is the "phantom exercise" filtering. The test expectation is incompatible with this behavior. I'll split into two focused tests:
The file /home/runner/work/A-Guy/A-Guy/tests/unit/lib/context-exercise-parser/parser-gaps.test.ts has been updated successfully.
